title: Organigram (OGI) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Organigram (OGI) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript. Earnings Announcement: Organigram Global (OGI) was scheduled to announce Q2 earnings results on Tuesday, May 12th, before market open. Revenue Expectations: The consensus revenue estimate was $50.48M. Actual Q2 2024 Results: The company ultimately reported stronger results than the initial consensus estimate. Recreational net revenue grew by 21% versus Q2 last year, and the company saw a net increase in gross revenue of 8.6% to 57.4 million for the quarter, compared to 52.9 million. Earnings call held May 14, 2024.
